mapper.sql: id, node_type, parent_id, name, depth, is_deleted as deleted, delete_dt, create_dt, modify_dt, child_count, total_size, link_target_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cms.ap_node (id, node_type, parent_id, name, depth, link_target_id) VALUES ( CAST(#{id} AS UUID), #{nodeType}, CAST(#{parentId} AS UUID), #{name}, #{depth}, CAST(#{linkTargetId} AS UUID) )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM cms.ap_node WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS UUID)
SELECT FROM cms.ap_node WHERE parent_id IS NULL AND is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY node_type ASC, name ASC
SELECT FROM cms.ap_node WHERE parent_id = CAST(#{parentId} AS UUID) AND is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY node_type ASC, name ASC

WITH RECURSIVE ancestors AS ( SELECT id, node_type, parent_id, name, depth, is_deleted, delete_dt, create_dt, modify_dt, child_count, total_size, link_target_id FROM cms.ap_node WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS UUID) UNION ALL SELECT n.id, n.node_type, n.parent_id, n.name, n.depth, n.is_deleted, n.delete_dt, n.create_dt, n.modify_dt, n.child_count, n.total_size, n.link_target_id FROM cms.ap_node n JOIN ancestors a ON n.id = a.parent_id ) SELECT id, node_type, parent_id, name, depth, is_deleted as deleted, delete_dt, create_dt, modify_dt, child_count, total_size, link_target_id FROM ancestors ORDER BY depth ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE cms.ap_node SET is_deleted = TRUE, delete_dt = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS UUID)
UPDATE cms.ap_node SET child_count = child_count + 1 WHERE id = CAST(#{parentId} AS UUID)
UPDATE cms.ap_node SET child_count = GREATEST(child_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = CAST(#{parentId} AS UUID)
UPDATE cms.ap_node SET total_size = GREATEST(total_size + #{delta}, 0) WHERE id = CAST(#{parentId} AS UUID)
